/usr/bin/g++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/mlir2sea.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o mlir2sea  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/llvm-18/lib /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libMLIRParser.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libMLIRFuncDialect.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libMLIRArithDialect.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libMLIRIR.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libMLIRSupport.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libLLVMSupport.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libMLIRBytecodeReader.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libMLIRAsmParser.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libMLIRCallInterfaces.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libMLIRControlFlowInterfaces.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libMLIRFunctionInterfaces.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libMLIRSideEffectInterfaces.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libMLIRInferTypeOpInterface.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libMLIRCastInterfaces.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libMLIRDialect.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libMLIRInferIntRangeCommon.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libMLIRInferIntRangeInterface.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libMLIRUBDialect.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libMLIRIR.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libMLIRSupport.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libLLVM.so.1 -lrt -ldl -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libzstd.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libtinfo.so /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libLLVMDemangle.a
